title: Ubiquiti UXG-Lite
description: A compact and powerful UniFi gateway with a full suite of advanced routing and security features Up to 10x routing performance increase over USG (tested with IPS/IDS, QoS, and Smart Queues) Managed with a Cloud Key, Official UniFi Hosting, or UniFi Network Server (1) Gigabit LAN port (1) Gigabit WAN port Compact footprint USB-C powered (adapter included)
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power type USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 3,8 Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 40 Width [mm] 98 Height [mm] 30 Depth [mm] 98 Hardware CPU ARM Cortex-A53 CPU frequency [MHz] 1000 CPU cores 2 RAM [MB] 1024
